overview:
Feel the warm sun on your face as you step into Vietnam’s kaleidoscope of wonders—each moment a new page in your personal travel story. With Travelxploria as your guide, you’ll glide past emerald rice terraces in Sapa aboard a private air-conditioned coach, the morning mist swirling around terraces that seem sculpted by ancient hands. We’ll sail you through Ha Long Bay’s otherworldly limestone karsts on a luxury junk, where a chef prepares a feast of freshly caught seafood as the sun dips below the horizon in a blaze of amber and gold.

In Hanoi’s Old Quarter, our expert local storyteller leads you down winding lantern-lit alleyways to hidden pho stalls and rooftop cafés, sharing tales of emperors and revolutionaries as you sip on egg coffee. Then trade the city buzz for the rhythmic waterways of the Mekong Delta—paddle a sampan past coconut groves, barter for exotic fruits at floating markets, and toast with orchard farmers over fresh sugar-cane juice.

Finally, let Travelxploria carry you off to Phu Quoc’s powdery beaches, where a beachfront villa awaits with chilled cocktails and silk-soft sands under a canopy of stars. From seamless first-class flights and boutique accommodations to intimate encounters with Vietnam’s vibrant heart, every detail is curated so you can simply lose—and find—yourself in this land of timeless charm.

Ho Chi Minh

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

Ho Chi Minh City Arrival - Half Day City Tour
Ticket Included
Ho Chi Minh City Arrival - Half Day City Tour
Ticket Included
Ho Chi Minh City Arrival - Half Day City Tour
Ticket Included
Ho Chi Minh City Arrival - Half Day City Tour
Ticket Included

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

Cu Chi Tunnel Tour

Cu Chi Tunnel Tour
Ticket Included

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Phu Quoc

Your journey begins with a smooth flight from Ho Chi Minh to the tropical paradise of Phu Quoc, where our Travelxploria representative awaits to welcome you. From the moment you land, everything is effortlessly arranged for your comfort. Our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you on a fascinating half-day city tour, uncovering the island’s hidden gems. Explore the vibrant Dinh Cau Night Market, marvel at the island’s stunning beaches, and visit iconic landmarks like the Ho Quoc Pagoda. Throughout the journey, our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience, from seamless transfers to personalized assistance. Whether you're soaking in the island’s charm or enjoying its cultural wonders, Travelxploria guarantees a stress-free adventure. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, all you need to do is relax and embrace the magic of Phu Quoc—because with Travelxploria, your journey is always in expert hands.

Ho Chi Minh – Phu Quoc – Phu Quoc Half Day City Tour

Get ready for an exhilarating day as our Travelxploria representative welcomes you for a seamless start to your Phu Quoc snorkeling adventure. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, hop aboard a speedboat and set off toward the island’s most stunning coral reefs. Feel the thrill as you dive into crystal-clear waters, exploring vibrant marine life beneath the surface. Our best on-ground support staff ensures your comfort, providing high-quality snorkeling gear and expert guidance at every step. After a morning of underwater exploration, savor a delicious seafood lunch on a picturesque beach, soaking in the island’s tropical beauty. As the day winds down, relax on the boat ride back, knowing Travelxploria has taken care of every detail—from pick-up to drop-off. With seamless logistics and a touch of luxury, this unforgettable snorkeling experience is designed for pure adventure and relaxation. Let Travelxploria make your Phu Quoc dreams come true.

Enjoy a carefree day in paradise as our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience from start to finish. Whether you prefer lounging on pristine beaches, exploring at your own pace, or indulging in island delicacies, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and best on-ground support staff are always available to assist. With effortless pick-up and drop-off, relaxation comes naturally.

As your Phu Quoc adventure comes to an end, our Travelxploria representative ensures a stress-free and seamless departure. With the assistance of our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and best on-ground support staff, your transfer to the airport is handled effortlessly. From pick-up to drop-off, Travelxploria guarantees a smooth and memorable farewell to this island paradise.

Inclusion / Exclusion

Inclusions

  • Assistance on arrival and departure.
  • All Airport - Hotel - Airport transfers on Private basis.
  • All Tours & activities on sharing basis / Pvt
  • Vehicle will not be on disposal.
  • Daily breakfast at hotel.
  • English speaking tour guide
  • Accommodation in Double Occupancy.
  • Half Day Ho Chi Minh City Tour
  • Cu Chi Tunnel Tour
  • Mekong Delta Tour
  • Phu Quoc Half Day City Tour
  • Full Day Phu Quoc Snorkeling Tour By Speedboat With Lunch

Exclusion

  • Bank charges, payment gateway charges.
  • Expenses of personal nature such as Laundry, telephone calls, tips, Liquor, Mineral water, Airport Tax, Insurance, Meal outside hotel etc.
  • Camera Charges.
  • Additional car usage beyond Itinerary.
  • Any supplementary service not mentioned in itinerary as a suggested addition such as water sports or any similar activity.
  • Any other item not specified in "Cost Includes".
  • Additional or incremental expenses arising out of acts of god, political disturbance, strike etc.
  • Any change in government tax structure and amount becoming due thereto.
  • Currency conversion charges.
  • Visa Charges
  • Travel Insurance
  • Return Airfare
  • TCS 5%
  • GST 5%

day_details.day_summary: After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

day_details.day_title: Ho Chi Minh – Phu Quoc – Phu Quoc Half Day City Tour
day_details.day_summary: Your journey begins with a smooth flight from Ho Chi Minh to the tropical paradise of Phu Quoc, where our Travelxploria representative awaits to welcome you. From the moment you land, everything is effortlessly arranged for your comfort. Our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you on a fascinating half-day city tour, uncovering the island’s hidden gems. Explore the vibrant Dinh Cau Night Market, marvel at the island’s stunning beaches, and visit iconic landmarks like the Ho Quoc Pagoda. Throughout the journey, our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience, from seamless transfers to personalized assistance. Whether you're soaking in the island’s charm or enjoying its cultural wonders, Travelxploria guarantees a stress-free adventure. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, all you need to do is relax and embrace the magic of Phu Quoc—because with Travelxploria, your journey is always in expert hands.

day_details.day_title: Full Day Phu Quoc Snorkeling Tour By Speedboat With Lunch
day_details.day_summary: Get ready for an exhilarating day as our Travelxploria representative welcomes you for a seamless start to your Phu Quoc snorkeling adventure. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, hop aboard a speedboat and set off toward the island’s most stunning coral reefs. Feel the thrill as you dive into crystal-clear waters, exploring vibrant marine life beneath the surface. Our best on-ground support staff ensures your comfort, providing high-quality snorkeling gear and expert guidance at every step. After a morning of underwater exploration, savor a delicious seafood lunch on a picturesque beach, soaking in the island’s tropical beauty. As the day winds down, relax on the boat ride back, knowing Travelxploria has taken care of every detail—from pick-up to drop-off. With seamless logistics and a touch of luxury, this unforgettable snorkeling experience is designed for pure adventure and relaxation. Let Travelxploria make your Phu Quoc dreams come true.

day_details.day_summary: Enjoy a carefree day in paradise as our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience from start to finish. Whether you prefer lounging on pristine beaches, exploring at your own pace, or indulging in island delicacies, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and best on-ground support staff are always available to assist. With effortless pick-up and drop-off, relaxation comes naturally.

As your Phu Quoc adventure comes to an end, our Travelxploria representative ensures a stress-free and seamless departure. With the assistance of our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and best on-ground support staff, your transfer to the airport is handled effortlessly. From pick-up to drop-off, Travelxploria guarantees a smooth and memorable farewell to this island paradise.
